name: Cheese'n Apple Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine or butter in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Gradually add flour and salt to the melted fat.
3. Stir constantly until the mixture is smooth and well combined.
4. Slowly incorporate milk into the mixture, stirring all the time.
5. Cook, stirring continuously, until the soup thickens.
6. Reduce heat if necessary to prevent boiling over.
7. Gradually fold in shredded Gouda cheese until completely melted and incorporated.
8. Stir in apple juice to combine flavors.
9. Heat through for a few minutes to ensure everything is thoroughly warm.
Makes four 1 1/4 cup servings.
